$comment: Single source of truth for tier classification, file caps, and budgets. Read by measure-tokens.js. Phase 0 ships in observe-only mode (enforce_caps: false). Phase 2f flips enforce to true.
$comment_caps: Caps reflect realistic floors with 12 months of memory. Tier 1 is dominated by user content (personality, integrations, INDEX descriptions). Framework files (CLAUDE.md, capture-rules, manifest) are aggressively trimmed; further cuts would lose findability. Original baseline before optimization: 8,278 tokens / 463 lines. Tier 1 was tightened to 5,800 in the 2026-04-29 token-optimization PR; raised to 7,500 on 2026-04-30 (organic memory growth + A3 session-block overhead); raised to 7,800 on 2026-04-30 (autonomy roadmap Ship 1) to absorb Action-states + Conversational-tics rules. Raised again 2026-05-01 (wiki-graph: split profile/people.md and service-providers.md into per-entity pages, expanding INDEX rows). 2026-05-02: +100 to absorb migration 0022 path rename (ops/ -> runtime/, ~+1 token per occurrence in path-heavy Tier 1 files). 2026-05-02: tier1 10300 -> 10800 / cache-stable 9400 -> 9800 to absorb densify-wiki Phase 1 ENTITIES.md growth (27 -> 36 entities + 4 service-provider stubs + Google/Vercel/Anthropic/HostMind), with ~400 tokens headroom for further organic growth. 2026-05-02 (v5.0.0): folded the former AGENTS.md into CLAUDE.md (single canonical instruction file); cap raised 90 -> 120 to absorb new 'Claude Code specifics' section (skills/MCPs/sub-agents prose) with growth headroom. 2026-05-02 (artifacts cleanup): cache-stable 9800 -> 9825, tier1_max_lines 510 -> 511 to absorb 'artifacts/' -> 'user-data/artifacts/' path correction in Artifacts rule (root artifacts/ removed; everything now under user-data/). 2026-05-02 (backup move + path-fix sweep): tier1 10800 -> 11000, cache-stable 9825 -> 10025, tier1_max_lines 511 -> 520 to absorb organic Tier 1 growth (integrations.md/ENTITIES.md) plus the 'artifacts/' -> 'user-data/artifacts/' path corrections in integrations.md and other in-context files. 2026-05-02 (claude-response-latency design): tier1 11000 -> 13500 / cache-stable 10025 -> 12200 / lines 520 -> 600 / user-data INDEX cap 90 -> 115. Absorbs (a) the new 'Where to look first' routing block in INDEX.md (~250-400 tokens, ~13 lines), (b) the CLAUDE.md Recall rule amendment (~70 tokens), and (c) accumulated organic memory growth that pushed actual Tier 1 to ~12,650 even before this PR's adds. ~850 tokens of headroom for further growth before the next bump. Revisit when Tier 1 baseline drifts past 7,000.

tier1_files.$comment: Single canonical instruction file (v5.0.0 fold of former AGENTS.md). Cap 120 = current ~90 lines + ~30 headroom for Claude Code specifics growth (skills/MCPs/sub-agents prose).

Cap 150: covers archive + 4 sub-indexes (events/movies/photography/calendar-events) + root files + small sub-trees with growth headroom. Raised from 70 → 80 → 90 across 2026-04-30 (calendar events subindex; security cycles); raised to 150 on 2026-05-02 to absorb organic memory-tree growth (~125 lines pre-routing-block) plus the 'Where to look first' routing block (~13 lines) plus headroom.

Auto-generated entity index for fast recall lookup; capped at ~150 rows in lib/entity-index.js writeEntitiesAtomic. Loaded right after INDEX.md so both daily-Dream-regenerated files invalidate together.
Cap 60: migration 0014 seeds 7 starter questions (~43 lines incl. frontmatter). Headroom for 2-3 organically-promoted questions before alerting.
